description: Stylish and super cool, these black formal boots with a pointed toe design from red tape will add an extra bounce to your steps. With a high quality leather upper and no laces, they are easy to wear and take off. They can also be used as semi-formal boots and will look great with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers. Easy to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Leather upper for added durability and style Pointed toe design for a more stylish look Elastic gores on either side of the midfoot for a more versatile Fit Leather haul loop to hang shoes from a backpack Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Leather inner lining and footbed for absorbing moisture and keeping the feet dry, offering all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight rubber outsole with a wooden finish Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
